lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Ship database — hull stats and hardpoint counts cross-checked when judging each hull for anti-xeno duty.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Thargoid Combat
sources.what: Thargoid hull mechanics, hearts, and AX weapon effectiveness referenced in the ratings.

sources.label: ED Wiki — AX Conflict Zone
sources.what: AX conflict-zone structure and threat tiers used to judge each hull’s fit.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Build guide for a Thargoid-killing hull, covering AX/Guardian weapon loadout and supporting module choices for fast kills.
